name: Purple Eyes Ultra Max Dragon
desc:
"Red-Eyes Black Dragon" or 1 Dragon Effect Monster + "Blue-Eyes White Dragon"
Must be Fusion Summoned. Cannot be destroyed by card effects. Unaffected by other cards' effects during the Battle Phase. If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can add 1 Spell/Trap that mentions "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" or "Red-Eyes Black Dragon" from your Deck to your hand. When a card or effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. You can use this effect up to a number of times per turn equal to the number of Normal Monsters used as Fusion Material for this card. This card can make a second attack during each Battle Phase. Gains 500 ATK for each monster your opponent controls that is destroyed.
strings: Search Spell/Trap mentioning BEWD or REBD
